---
title: "Tree families"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator instead. -->

- [Betulaceae (Birch family)](/trees/family/betulaceae.html) — 1 species
- [Oleaceae (Olive family)](/trees/family/oleaceae.html) — 2 species
- [Pinaceae (Pine family)](/trees/family/pinaceae.html) — 2 species
